headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Mosaic, Lowers Price Target to $22
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Michael Sison   maintains Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $25 to $22.
